mapper.select: select distinct p.permission_code from sys_user_role ur inner join sys_role_permission rp on ur.role_id = rp.role_id inner join sys_permission p on rp.permission_id = p.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.deleted = 0 and rp.deleted = 0 and p.deleted = 0 and p.status = 1 order by p.permission_type asc, p.id asc
